description:
Teleport Connect provides easy and secure access to SSH servers, databases, applications, Windows desktops, and Kubernetes clusters.


- Fix a bug on Windows where a forwarded SSH agent would become dysfunctional after a single connection using the agent. #57511
- Fixed usage print for global --help flag. #57451
- Added Cursor and VSCode install buttons in MCP connect dialog in Web UI. #57362
- Added "Allowed Tools" to "tsh mcp ls" and show a warning if no tools allowed. #57360
- Tctl top respects local teleport config file. #57354
- Fixed an issue backfilling CRLs during startup for long-standing clusters. #57321
- Disable NLA in FIPS mode. #57307
- Added a configurable delay between receiving a termination signal and shutting down. #57211
Enterprise:
- Slightly optimized access token refresh logic for Jamf integration when using API credentials.
